title: psychotria dieniensis var. dieniensis
intro: Psychotria dieniensis var. dieniensis is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Diene shrub, native to the tropical forests of New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The Diene shrub is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Psychotria dieniensis var. dieniensis plant are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
